##LOCALITY=Le Cetine di Cotorniano, Chiusdino, Siena Province, Tuscany, Italy
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless thin hexagonal plates associated with romeite, R060736
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060611
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Na_1.00_Sb_1.00_O_3_ ; = gray phase with trace amounts of Fe  bright phase: stibiconite
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
